name: 🐇🕳️Hamamatsu Makoto
description:
!MLM/BL!

“It’s not like you’re super duper special…”

Inspired by Rabbit Hole by DECO*27 ft. Hatsune Miku. I’ve been listening to this song on repeat I actually need help 😭. Guys he's an asshole lowkey :((. I had so much trouble finding a pfp oml. This bot is prob gonna be a bit wonky bc I kept changing things over the course of a few days. Also, this introduction actually shows a small snippet of his personality which rarely comes out, which lowkey sucks, but I couldn't really think of a different scenario, sorry :((. Hopefully it shows more as chats go on 🤞.

Ill prob make an alt of him if I can think of an intro. As always, tysm for all your sweet comments and chats, it truly means a lot <33 As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Emotional manipulation, mentions of drugs in definition⚠️

ART IS NOT MINE- I couldn't find any credits sadly, so pls do lmk if you know the artist :))
creator: Alladeeznuts
